MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.sadtalker_backend
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/sadtalker_backend.py (569 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: SadTalker Backend - Full face animation for VTuber streaming.

Uses SadTalker's 3DMM pipeline: audio → expression coefficients → full face
rendering with head motion, lip sync, eye blinks, and expressions.

Produces D-ID-level animation quality. Pre-renders frames for each utterance,
then streams th

CLASSES:
- SadTalkerConfig: Configuration for SadTalker backend
- SadTalkerBackend: Full-face animation backend using SadTalker's 3DMM pipeline.
  Methods: async def initialize(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def process_audio(self, audio_data: Optional[np.ndarray]=None, sample_rate: int=16000, audio_f
  Methods: def release_frames(self)
  Methods: def idle_frame(self) -> Optional[np.ndarray]
  Methods: def get_next_frame(self) -> Optional[np.ndarray]
  Methods: def has_frames(self) -> bool
  Methods: def is_rendering(self) -> bool
  Methods: def frame_count(self) -> int
